name: healthcare_school_district_s_new_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare school district s new southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Sana Kaur
agents.identity: I am Sana Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Inez Diallo
agents.identity: I am Inez Diallo, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Sana Kaur must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Sana Kaur do?
